String:
Combatants are skilled warriors trained to have the upper hand in combat situations. A Combatant is someone to fear when going up against them. Combatants are important to factions by not only being a skilled warrior, but holding their own in a fight. They can use their wit and strength to persevere through any obstacle.

%1!s!</font>

Entrepreneurs are not only skilled with combat training, they benefit from mining and the production of multiple items.Clones of this class are always looking for more ways to sell their products to other players while benefitting from personal gain. An Entrepreneur is not only a salesman, but has a keen sense of battle. 

<font type='18' size='12'>Skills:
%1!s!</font>

An infiltrator is a stealthy, sly, hacker that has been assigned a mission to create war, or to loot an apartment for personal gain. They are skilled at getting past codes and other road blocks in his/her way. Known for their remarkable success at getting past codes, they are also known as thieves. An Infiltrator can be the gateway to war, or losing possessions in a person’s apartment.

<font type='18' size='12'>Skills:
%1!s!</font>

A Medical Technician heals those who have been in combat that have lacerations, or are mortally wounded. Not only are they important for a faction’s survival, but they are also important to keep fellow clones alive during, or out of combat. Medical Technicians are known for their survivability during fights, and their swift healing for either themselves or others. 

<font type='18' size='12'>Skills:
%1!s!</font>

A Bounty Hunter is a stealthily, agile person who can eliminate a target that has a price on his/her head. They are quick to kill, yet hard to kill unless compromised. They have the ability to gain personal wealth from eliminating targets that are assigned to them.  Bounty Hunters set the stage for eliminating people that stand in a faction’s way, or could plummet a faction into war.
